conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: The phrase "valuable experience" must appear exactly twice in the email.
new_constraint: The keyword "experience" must be used exclusively as a verb.
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. The phrase "valuable experience" must appear exactly twice in the email. The keyword "experience" must be used exclusively as a verb.
response:
Subject: Thank You - [Your Name] - Internship Program

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to participate in the internship program this past [Semester/Summer]. My time working with you and the [Department/Lab Name] team has been incredibly rewarding.

I truly gained a **valuable experience** during this program. The knowledge and practical skills I was able to acquire in [mention a specific area or project] have significantly shaped my understanding of [field of study]. I especially appreciated your guidance on [mention a specific piece of advice or project].

This internship provided me with a **valuable experience** that I know will greatly benefit my future academic and professional pursuits. I feel I was able to fully absorb the material and actively participate in the research/work.

Thank you again for your mentorship and for providing such a rich learning environment. I hope to stay in touch and keep you updated on my progress.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID or Contact Information]<turn|>
